title: GPS 101: Core Workflow
text: tutorial practical introduction grazer core pipeline: Start GPS rows canonical columns (sensor_id, datetime, lon, lat). Validate required schema data types. Clean obvious errors noise. Calculate movement, social, spatial metrics. Summarise results daily metrics interpretation.

title: GPS 101: Core Workflow
text: structured workflow helps avoid common analysis problems: detect data issues model fitting. apply cleaning rules consistently across experiments. generate comparable metrics across paddocks, cohorts, deployments. keep row-level day-level outputs aligned QA reporting.

title: GPS 101: Core Workflow
code: library(grazer)

title: GPS 101: Core Workflow
text: vignette builds synthetic data fully reproducible. real projects typically call grz_read_gps("your_file.csv").
code: set.seed(101)  timestamps <- seq(   from = as.POSIXct("2024-05-01 00:00:00", tz = "UTC"),   by = "10 min",   length.out = 3 * 24 * 6 )  animal_ids <- c("A01", "A02", "A03") gps_raw <- data.frame()  for (i in seq_along(animal_ids)) {   one_animal <- data.frame(     sensor_id = animal_ids[i],     datetime = timestamps,     lon = 132.30 + (i * 0.004) + cumsum(rnorm(length(timestamps), 0, 0.00018)),     lat = -14.47 - (i * 0.002) + cumsum(rnorm(length(timestamps), 0, 0.00015)),     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   )   gps_raw <- rbind(gps_raw, one_animal) }  # Add a few realistic issues so validation and cleaning have visible effects. gps_raw <- rbind(gps_raw, gps_raw[1:5, ])   # duplicate rows gps_raw$lon[20] <- 0                         # invalid location (0,0) gps_raw$lat[20] <- 0 gps_raw$datetime[33] <- NA                   # invalid datetime  nrow(gps_raw) #> [1] 1301 head(gps_raw) #>   sensor_id            datetime      lon       lat #> 1       A01 2024-05-01 00:00:00 132.3039 -14.47195 #> 2       A01 2024-05-01 00:10:00 132.3040 -14.47191 #> 3       A01 2024-05-01 00:20:00 132.3039 -14.47179 #> 4       A01 2024-05-01 00:30:00 132.3040 -14.47194 #> 5       A01 2024-05-01 00:40:00 132.3040 -14.47172 #> 6       A01 2024-05-01 00:50:00 132.3042 -14.47183

what: 3) Validate required columns and row values
title: GPS 101: Core Workflow
code: gps_valid <- grz_validate(   data = gps_raw,   drop_invalid = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE ) #> [validate] rows=1,301 invalid=1 drop_invalid=FALSE  validation_qc <- attr(gps_valid, "validation_qc") invalid_rows <- attr(gps_valid, "invalid_rows")  validation_qc #>                 metric count   proportion #>                 <char> <int>        <num> #> 1:              n_rows  1301 1.0000000000 #> 2:      n_invalid_rows     1 0.0007686395 #> 3: n_missing_sensor_id     0 0.0000000000 #> 4:  n_invalid_datetime     1 0.0007686395 #> 5:       n_invalid_lon     0 0.0000000000 #> 6:       n_invalid_lat     0 0.0000000000 head(invalid_rows) #>    sensor_id datetime      lon       lat   invalid_reason #>       <char>   <POSc>    <num>     <num>           <char> #> 1:       A01     <NA> 132.3039 -14.47294 invalid_datetime

title: GPS 101: Core Workflow
text: run applies four common cleaning steps: duplicates: removes repeated fixes. errors: drops invalid coordinates malformed rows. speed_fixed: removes biologically implausible moves. denoise: reduces local GPS bounce static periods.
code: gps_clean <- grz_clean(   data = gps_valid,   steps = c("duplicates", "errors", "speed_fixed", "denoise"),   max_speed_mps = 4,   verbose = TRUE ) #> [clean] start_rows=1,301 #> [clean_duplicates] dropped: 5 | rows: 1,301 -> 1,296 #> [clean_errors] dropped_sensor=0 dropped_datetime=1 dropped_coord=0 dropped_zero_zero=1 #> [clean_errors] dropped: 2 | rows: 1,296 -> 1,294 #> [clean_speed_fixed] threshold=4.000 m/s #> [clean_speed_fixed] dropped: 0 | rows: 1,294 -> 1,294 #> [denoise] radius_m=8.0 max_gap_mins=20.0 #> [denoise] dropped: 108 | rows: 1,294 -> 1,186 #> [clean] final_rows=1,186  nrow(gps_clean) #> [1] 1186 head(gps_clean) #>   sensor_id            datetime      lon       lat #> 1       A01 2024-05-01 00:00:00 132.3039 -14.47195 #> 2       A01 2024-05-01 00:10:00 132.3040 -14.47191 #> 3       A01 2024-05-01 00:20:00 132.3039 -14.47179 #> 4       A01 2024-05-01 00:30:00 132.3040 -14.47194 #> 5       A01 2024-05-01 00:40:00 132.3040 -14.47172 #> 6       A01 2024-05-01 00:50:00 132.3042 -14.47183

what: 5) Calculate row-level movement and social metrics
title: GPS 101: Core Workflow

what: 6) Summarise to day-level movement, social, and spatial outputs
title: GPS 101: Core Workflow

what: 7) Plot key features for quick QA
title: GPS 101: Core Workflow
text: Use quick plots check whether values biologically reasonable.
code: par(mfrow = c(1, 2))  hist(   gps_metrics$step_m,   breaks = 40,   main = "Step Distance (m)",   xlab = "step_m",   col = "grey80",   border = "white" )  hist(   gps_metrics$speed_mps,   breaks = 40,   main = "Speed (m/s)",   xlab = "speed_mps",   col = "grey80",   border = "white" ) par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

title: GPS 101: Core Workflow
text: Continue 201 tutorial : active/inactive classification, manual state labelling grz_label_gps_states(), prediction-vs-label validation.

title: GPS 201: Activity Classification and Validation
text: tutorial covers next stage cleaning metric generation: classify GPS row active inactive, manually label rows interactive app, compare model predictions labels, rank parameter settings agreement.

title: GPS 201: Activity Classification and Validation
text: State classification iterative. clear validation loop gives better decisions: can inspect model assumptions map real movement behaviour. can use manual labels transparent ground-truth reference. can tune parameters reproducible auditable process. can report uncertainty model agreement directly.

title: GPS 201: Activity Classification and Validation
code: library(grazer)  set.seed(202)  timestamps <- seq(   from = as.POSIXct("2024-06-01 00:00:00", tz = "UTC"),   by = "10 min",   length.out = 2 * 24 * 6 )  animal_ids <- c("A01", "A02") gps <- data.frame()  for (i in seq_along(animal_ids)) {   one_animal <- data.frame(     sensor_id = animal_ids[i],     datetime = timestamps,     lon = 132.31 + (i * 0.003) + cumsum(rnorm(length(timestamps), 0, 0.00020)),     lat = -14.46 - (i * 0.002) + cumsum(rnorm(length(timestamps), 0, 0.00016)),     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   )   gps <- rbind(gps, one_animal) }  gps <- grz_clean(   data = gps,   steps = c("errors", "speed_fixed", "denoise"),   max_speed_mps = 4,   verbose = FALSE )

title: GPS 201: Activity Classification and Validation
text: grz_classify_activity_consensus() combines HMM spatial signals one final state column.
code: gps_states <- grz_classify_activity_consensus(   data = gps,   groups = "sensor_id",   verbose = FALSE )  table(gps_states$activity_state_consensus, useNA = "ifany") #>  #>   active inactive  #>      363      167

title: GPS 201: Activity Classification and Validation
text: Use interactive R session create edit label column. save output CSV, can reload later continue editing:
code: gps_states$point_id <- paste(   gps_states$sensor_id,   format(gps_states$datetime, "%Y%m%d%H%M%S", tz = "UTC"),   seq_len(nrow(gps_states)),   sep = "_" )  labelled <- grz_label_gps_states(   data = gps_states,   lon = "lon",   lat = "lat",   time = "datetime",   id = "point_id",   color_by = "sensor_id",   initial_label_col = "label",   start_day_offset = 0L,   time_window = "week",   n_animals = 1L,   animal_col = "sensor_id" ) # data.table::fwrite(labelled, "labelled_states.csv") # labelled <- data.table::fread("labelled_states.csv") # labelled$datetime <- as.POSIXct(labelled$datetime, tz = "UTC")

title: GPS 201: Activity Classification and Validation
text: fully reproducible vignette, create synthetic label column copying predictions flipping random subset rows. project, replace manual labels grz_label_gps_states().
code: labelled <- gps_states labelled$label <- labelled$activity_state_consensus  set.seed(303) flip_n <- floor(0.1 * nrow(labelled)) flip_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(labelled)), size = flip_n)  labelled$label[flip_idx] <- ifelse(   labelled$label[flip_idx] == "active",   "inactive",   "active" )  table(labelled$label, useNA = "ifany") #>  #>   active inactive  #>      342      188

what: 5) Tune parameters and rank the top 3 settings
title: GPS 201: Activity Classification and Validation
code: grid <- expand.grid(   inactive_threshold = c(0.50, 0.55, 0.60),   spatial_radius_m = c(15, 20),   spatial_min_dwell_mins = c(10, 20),   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  results <- data.frame(   inactive_threshold = numeric(0),   spatial_radius_m = numeric(0),   spatial_min_dwell_mins = numeric(0),   n_compared = integer(0),   accuracy = numeric(0) )  for (i in seq_len(nrow(grid))) {   pred <- grz_classify_activity_consensus(     data = labelled,     groups = "sensor_id",     decision_rule = "weighted",     inactive_threshold = grid$inactive_threshold[i],     spatial_radius_m = grid$spatial_radius_m[i],     spatial_min_dwell_mins = grid$spatial_min_dwell_mins[i],     spatial_min_points = 3L,     min_run_n = 2L,     verbose = FALSE   )    truth <- tolower(trimws(as.character(labelled$label)))   pred_state <- tolower(trimws(as.character(pred$activity_state_consensus)))   keep <- truth %in% c("active", "inactive") & pred_state %in% c("active", "inactive")    n_compared <- sum(keep)   accuracy <- if (n_compared == 0L) NA_real_ else mean(truth[keep] == pred_state[keep])    results <- rbind(     results,     data.frame(       inactive_threshold = grid$inactive_threshold[i],       spatial_radius_m = grid$spatial_radius_m[i],       spatial_min_dwell_mins = grid$spatial_min_dwell_mins[i],       n_compared = n_compared,       accuracy = accuracy     )   ) }  top3 <- results[order(-results$accuracy, -results$n_compared), ][1:3, ] top3$accuracy_percent <- round(100 * top3$accuracy, 2) top3 #>    inactive_threshold spatial_radius_m spatial_min_dwell_mins n_compared #> 6                 0.6               20                     10        530 #> 12                0.6               20                     20        530 #> 3                 0.6               15                     10        530 #>     accuracy accuracy_percent #> 6  0.9000000            90.00 #> 12 0.9000000            90.00 #> 3  0.7943396            79.43

title: GPS 201: Activity Classification and Validation
text: helpers useful enough labelled data:
code: # Diurnal feature patterns for threshold setting grz_plot_diurnal_metrics(   data = labelled,   metrics = c("step_m", "turn_rad"),   group_col = "sensor_id" )  # Behaviour diagnostics (feature summary, transitions, bouts, PCA) diagnostics <- grz_validate_behavior(   data = labelled,   state_col = "activity_state_consensus",   groups = "sensor_id",   pca = TRUE )

title: GPS 201: Activity Classification and Validation
text: Label representative subset (example, one animal one week). Tune parameters subset. Validate performance metrics. Freeze parameters run full-cohort processing. Re-check performance deployment conditions change.

what: Ingest, Clean, and Analyze Cattle GPS Data
title: Ingest, Clean, and Analyze Cattle GPS Data
text: grazer provides tools ingest, clean, map, analyse GPS data cattle grazing experiments. package designed around practical pipeline: data import -> validation -> cleaning -> metric calculation -> behavior interpretation. Website (pkgdown): https://wobblytwilliams.github.io/grazer/

title: Ingest, Clean, and Analyze Cattle GPS Data
text: Install released version CRAN (available): Install development version GitHub:
code: # install.packages("grazer") install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("wobblytwilliams/grazer")

title: Ingest, Clean, and Analyze Cattle GPS Data
text: Minimum required columns : Additional columns treated metadata retained workflow possible.

title: Ingest, Clean, and Analyze Cattle GPS Data
code: library(grazer)  # 1) Read and validate gps <- grz_read_gps("path/to/gps.csv", validate = FALSE) gps <- grz_validate(gps, drop_invalid = TRUE)  # 2) Clean gps_clean <- grz_clean(   gps,   steps = c("duplicates", "errors", "speed_fixed", "denoise"),   max_speed_mps = 4 )  # 3) Row-level metrics gps_move <- grz_calculate_movement(gps_clean) gps_social <- grz_calculate_social(gps_clean)  # 4) Epoch summaries daily_metrics <- grz_calculate_epoch_metrics(gps_clean, epoch = "day")  head(daily_metrics)

title: Ingest, Clean, and Analyze Cattle GPS Data
text: Ingest validation: - grz_read_gps() - grz_standardise_gps() - grz_validate() - grz_validate_gps() Cleaning: - grz_clean_duplicates() - grz_clean_errors() - grz_clean_speed_fixed() - grz_clean_speed_stat() - grz_append_paddock_names() - grz_clean_spatial() - grz_denoise() - grz_clean() Row-level metrics: - grz_calculate_movement() - grz_calculate_social() Epoch-level summaries: - grz_summarise_movement() - grz_summarise_social() - grz_calculate_spatial() - grz_calculate_epoch_metrics() Behavior tools: - grz_plot_diurnal_metrics() - grz_behavior_threshold_guide() - grz_tune_thresholds() - grz_classify_activity_hmm() - grz_classify_activity_spatial() - grz_classify_activity_consensus() - grz_classify_behavior() - grz_plot_diurnal_states() - grz_validate_behavior() - grz_behavior_pipeline()

title: Ingest, Clean, and Analyze Cattle GPS Data
text: grz_map() interactive GPS mapping. grz_label_gps_states() manual ACTIVE/INACTIVE state labelling timeline app. Example:
code: labelled <- grz_label_gps_states(   data = gps_clean,   lon = "lon",   lat = "lat",   time = "datetime",   color_by = "sensor_id",   initial_label_col = "label" )

title: Ingest, Clean, and Analyze Cattle GPS Data
text: Functions return data.frame default. Set return_class = "data.table" supported data.table output. Cleaning functions drop-based report dropped row counts verbose = TRUE.

title: Ingest, Clean, and Analyze Cattle GPS Data
text: MIT License.

what: Align/interpolate to a regular interval — grz_align
title: Align/interpolate to a regular interval — grz_align
text: Align/interpolate regular interval

title: Align/interpolate to a regular interval — grz_align
code: grz_align(   data,   interval_mins = "base",   groups = NULL,   keep_extra = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Align/interpolate to a regular interval — grz_align
text: data Data frame sensor_id, datetime, lon, lat. interval_mins Target interval minutes, "base" infer median observed interval (rounded nearest minute). groups Grouping columns independent alignment. keep_extra Logical; carry extra columns exact timestamps exist. verbose Logical; print alignment summary. return_class Output class: "data.frame" (default) "data.table".

title: Align/interpolate to a regular interval — grz_align
text: Aligned data aligned_from_observation flag.

what: Append paddock names by point-in-polygon intersection — grz_append_paddock_names
title: Append paddock names by point-in-polygon intersection — grz_append_paddock_names
text: Uses buffered paddock polygons assigns daily modal paddock per animal. Rows intersecting modal paddock dropped.

title: Append paddock names by point-in-polygon intersection — grz_append_paddock_names
code: grz_append_paddock_names(   data,   paddocks_sf,   buffer_m = 100,   paddock_col = "paddock",   groups = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Append paddock names by point-in-polygon intersection — grz_append_paddock_names
text: data Data frame lon, lat, datetime, sensor_id. paddocks_sf sf polygon object. buffer_m Buffer distance meters. paddock_col Output paddock column name. groups Grouping columns used modal paddock assignment (default deployment + sensor available). verbose Logical; print diagnostics. return_class Output class: "data.frame" (default) "data.table".

title: Append paddock names by point-in-polygon intersection — grz_append_paddock_names
text: Data appended paddock column dropped --paddock rows.

title: Behavior interpretation pipeline — grz_behavior_pipeline
text: End--end helper iterative behavior interpretation: diurnal metric plot -> classify states -> diurnal state plot -> validation.

title: Behavior interpretation pipeline — grz_behavior_pipeline
code: grz_behavior_pipeline(   data,   groups = NULL,   cohort_col = NULL,   metrics = c("step_m", "turn_rad"),   classification_method = c("rules"),   threshold_guide = TRUE,   metrics_plot = TRUE,   states_plot = TRUE,   validate = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Behavior interpretation pipeline — grz_behavior_pipeline
text: data Input GPS data. groups Grouping columns used movement/state calculations. cohort_col Optional cohort column used faceted plots. metrics Metrics diurnal metric visualisation. classification_method Behavior classification method. threshold_guide Logical; compute threshold guidance summaries plots. metrics_plot Logical; generate diurnal metric plot. states_plot Logical; generate diurnal state plot. validate Logical; run behavior validation. verbose Logical; print step summaries. return_class Output class returned tables.

title: Behavior interpretation pipeline — grz_behavior_pipeline
text: list containing classified data, plots, validation outputs.

what: Build threshold guidance summaries for behavior classification — grz_behavior_threshold_guide
title: Build threshold guidance summaries for behavior classification — grz_behavior_threshold_guide
text: Produces overall hourly quantile summaries (plus diagnostic plots) selected metrics help users choose rule-based behavior thresholds.

title: Build threshold guidance summaries for behavior classification — grz_behavior_threshold_guide
code: grz_behavior_threshold_guide(   data,   metrics = c("step_m", "turn_rad"),   cohort_col = NULL,   tz_local = "UTC",   probs = c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9),   max_points_plot = 150000L,   seed = 1,   include_tuning = TRUE,   tuning_rest_step_grid = seq(3, 12, by = 1),   tuning_rest_speed_grid = seq(0.03, 0.09, by = 0.02),   tuning_max_rows = 25000L,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Build threshold guidance summaries for behavior classification — grz_behavior_threshold_guide
text: data Input data containing least sensor_id, datetime, lon, lat. metrics Metrics used threshold guidance. cohort_col Optional cohort column used summaries facets. tz_local Time zone used derive hour--day. probs Quantile probabilities used summary tables. max_points_plot Maximum points used density plot subsample. seed Random seed used plotting subsample. include_tuning Logical; run threshold tuning diagnostics. tuning_rest_step_grid Candidate rest_step_max values tuning. tuning_rest_speed_grid Candidate rest_speed_max values tuning. tuning_max_rows Maximum rows used tuning sweep. return_class Output class returned tables.

title: Build threshold guidance summaries for behavior classification — grz_behavior_threshold_guide
text: list overall, hourly, plots (ggplot objects), optional tuning diagnostics.

title: Calculate merged epoch metrics — grz_calculate_epoch_metrics
text: Wrapper merges movement/social/spatial epoch summaries. Daily epoch default.

title: Calculate merged epoch metrics — grz_calculate_epoch_metrics
code: grz_calculate_epoch_metrics(   data,   epoch = c("day", "week", "month"),   include = c("movement", "social", "spatial"),   groups = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Calculate merged epoch metrics — grz_calculate_epoch_metrics
text: data Data frame GPS rows. epoch Epoch level: "day" (default), "week", "month". include metric blocks include. groups Grouping columns summaries. verbose Logical; print summary. return_class Output class: "data.frame" (default) "data.table".

title: Calculate merged epoch metrics — grz_calculate_epoch_metrics
text: Merged epoch metrics table.

title: Calculate row-level movement metrics — grz_calculate_movement

title: Calculate row-level social metrics — grz_calculate_social

Defaults available deployment_id paddock. verbose Logical; print summary. return_class Output class: "data.frame" (default) "data.table".

title: Calculate spatial/home-range metrics by epoch — grz_calculate_spatial
code: grz_calculate_spatial(   data,   epoch = c("day", "week", "month"),   groups = NULL,   min_fixes = 5,   verbose = TRUE,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Calculate spatial/home-range metrics by epoch — grz_calculate_spatial
text: data Data frame GPS rows. epoch Epoch level: "day" (default), "week", "month". groups Grouping columns summaries. min_fixes Minimum fixes compute metrics. verbose Logical; print summary. return_class Output class: "data.frame" (default) "data.table".

title: Calculate spatial/home-range metrics by epoch — grz_calculate_spatial
text: Spatial summary table.

what: Combine HMM and Spatial Activity Classifications — grz_classify_activity_consensus
title: Combine HMM and Spatial Activity Classifications — grz_classify_activity_consensus
text: Runs HMM spatial clustering methods, combines final inactive/active decision using either strict agreement, lenient union, weighted score.

title: Combine HMM and Spatial Activity Classifications — grz_classify_activity_consensus
code: grz_classify_activity_consensus(   data,   groups = NULL,   decision_col = "activity_state_consensus",   score_col = "inactive_score_consensus",   decision_rule = c("weighted", "both", "either"),   hmm_weight = 0.6,   spatial_weight = 0.4,   inactive_threshold = 0.6,   hmm_state_col = "activity_state_hmm",   hmm_prob_col = "inactive_prob_hmm",   spatial_state_col = "activity_state_spatial",   spatial_cluster_col = "activity_cluster_spatial",   spatial_dwell_col = "activity_dwell_mins_spatial",   hmm_fit_max_rows = 200000L,   spatial_radius_m = 20,   spatial_min_dwell_mins = 20,   spatial_min_points = 3L,   spatial_max_gap_mins = 60,   min_run_n = 2L,   seed = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Combine HMM and Spatial Activity Classifications — grz_classify_activity_consensus
text: data Input GPS data. groups Grouping columns used per-track classification. decision_col Output final state column name. score_col Output combined inactivity score column name. decision_rule Combination rule: "weighted" (default), "", "either". hmm_weight Weight HMM inactivity probability weighted rule. spatial_weight Weight spatial inactivity indicator weighted rule. inactive_threshold Threshold weighted score inactive label. hmm_state_col Output column name HMM state labels. hmm_prob_col Output column name HMM inactive probabilities. spatial_state_col Output column name spatial state labels. spatial_cluster_col Output spatial cluster id column name. spatial_dwell_col Output spatial dwell duration column name. hmm_fit_max_rows Maximum rows HMM fitting. spatial_radius_m Radius spatial clustering (meters). spatial_min_dwell_mins Minimum dwell time spatial inactivity. spatial_min_points Minimum points spatial inactivity cluster. spatial_max_gap_mins Maximum allowable gap within spatial clusters. min_run_n Optional run-length smoothing threshold. seed Random seed. verbose Logical; print summary output. return_class Output class: "data.frame" (default) "data.table".

title: Combine HMM and Spatial Activity Classifications — grz_classify_activity_consensus
text: Input data appended HMM, spatial, final consensus columns.

what: Classify Active/Inactive States Using HMM — grz_classify_activity_hmm
title: Classify Active/Inactive States Using HMM — grz_classify_activity_hmm
text: Fits 2-state Gaussian HMM transformed movement features decodes track inactive/active states. useful simple thresholding unstable due GPS jitter low-movement periods.

title: Classify Active/Inactive States Using HMM — grz_classify_activity_hmm
code: grz_classify_activity_hmm(   data,   groups = NULL,   step_col = "step_m",   turn_col = "turn_rad",   state_col = "activity_state_hmm",   state_id_col = "activity_state_id_hmm",   inactive_prob_col = "inactive_prob_hmm",   fit_max_rows = 200000L,   max_iter = 100L,   tol = 1e-04,   min_var = 1e-04,   min_run_n = 2L,   seed = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Classify Active/Inactive States Using HMM — grz_classify_activity_hmm
text: data Input GPS data. groups Grouping columns used track-wise decoding. step_col Step-distance column (meters). turn_col Turn-angle column (radians). state_col Output state column name. state_id_col Output numeric state id column. inactive_prob_col Output posterior probability column inactive state. fit_max_rows Maximum rows used fit HMM (sampled needed). max_iter Maximum EM iterations. tol EM convergence tolerance log-likelihood. min_var Minimum per-state feature variance numerical stability. min_run_n Optional run-length smoothing threshold. seed Random seed reproducible fitting/subsampling. verbose Logical; print summary output. return_class Output class: "data.frame" (default) "data.table".

title: Classify Active/Inactive States Using HMM — grz_classify_activity_hmm
text: Input data appended HMM activity columns.

what: Classify Active/Inactive States Using Spatial Clustering — grz_classify_activity_spatial
title: Classify Active/Inactive States Using Spatial Clustering — grz_classify_activity_spatial
text: Detects inactive bouts using staypoint-style spatial clustering approach: consecutive points remain within radius least minimum dwell time labelled inactive; points active.

title: Classify Active/Inactive States Using Spatial Clustering — grz_classify_activity_spatial
code: grz_classify_activity_spatial(   data,   groups = NULL,   state_col = "activity_state_spatial",   cluster_col = "activity_cluster_spatial",   dwell_col = "activity_dwell_mins_spatial",   radius_m = 20,   min_dwell_mins = 20,   min_points = 3L,   max_gap_mins = 60,   min_run_n = 1L,   verbose = TRUE,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Classify Active/Inactive States Using Spatial Clustering — grz_classify_activity_spatial
text: data Input GPS data. groups Grouping columns used per-track clustering. state_col Output state column name. cluster_col Output cluster id column name. dwell_col Output dwell duration column name (minutes). radius_m Spatial radius cluster membership (meters). min_dwell_mins Minimum dwell time inactive cluster. min_points Minimum consecutive points required cluster. max_gap_mins Maximum allowed gap consecutive fixes within cluster. min_run_n Optional run-length smoothing threshold. verbose Logical; print summary output. return_class Output class: "data.frame" (default) "data.table".

title: Classify Active/Inactive States Using Spatial Clustering — grz_classify_activity_spatial
text: Input data appended spatial activity columns.

what: Classify behavior states from movement metrics — grz_classify_behavior
title: Classify behavior states from movement metrics — grz_classify_behavior
text: Classifies row rest, graze, travel using transparent rule thresholds.

title: Classify behavior states from movement metrics — grz_classify_behavior
code: grz_classify_behavior(   data,   method = c("rules"),   state_col = "behavior_state",   groups = NULL,   rest_speed_max = 0.05,   rest_step_max = 5,   graze_speed_max = 0.6,   travel_speed_min = 0.6,   travel_turn_max = 0.6,   min_run_n = 1L,   verbose = TRUE,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Classify behavior states from movement metrics — grz_classify_behavior
text: data Input data containing GPS rows. method Classification method. Currently "rules" supported. state_col Name output state column. groups Grouping columns used run-order optional smoothing. rest_speed_max Maximum speed rest state (m/s). rest_step_max Maximum step distance rest state (m). graze_speed_max Maximum speed graze state (m/s). travel_speed_min Minimum speed travel state (m/s). travel_turn_max Maximum absolute turning angle travel (radians). min_run_n Optional run-length smoothing threshold. Runs shorter value replaced neighbouring states. verbose Logical; print summary counts. return_class Output class: "data.frame" (default) "data.table".

title: Classify behavior states from movement metrics — grz_classify_behavior
text: Input data appended state column.

code: grz_map(   data,   lon = "lon",   lat = "lat",   datetime = "datetime",   block = NULL,   group = NULL,   state_col = NULL,   state_colors = c(inactive = "#d7191c", active = "#1a9641"),   state_legend_title = "State",   timeline = FALSE,   popup_fields = c("sensor_id", "datetime"),   provider = "Esri.WorldImagery",   point_radius = 3,   point_opacity = 0.7,   max_points = NULL,   max_blocks = NULL,   sample_n = NULL,   max_block = NULL,   seed = 1,   large_n = 5000L,   block_n = 20L,   warnings = TRUE )

title: Plot Cattle GPS Fixes on an Interactive Leaflet Map — grz_map
text: data Data frame containing GPS points. lon Name longitude column. lat Name latitude column. datetime Name datetime column. block Deprecated alias group. group Optional grouping column(s) color/layer separation. state_col Optional state column fixed state coloring (example activity_state_hmm). state_colors Named colors state levels. Defaults red (inactive) green (active). state_legend_title Legend title used state_col provided. timeline Logical; TRUE, render points interactive time slider. popup_fields Character vector fields show marker popups. provider Tile provider name passed leaflet::addProviderTiles(). point_radius Marker radius. point_opacity Marker opacity. max_points Optional max number points render (random sample). max_blocks Optional maximum number block groups plot. sample_n Deprecated alias max_points. max_block Deprecated alias max_blocks. seed Random seed used sampling. large_n Threshold large map warning/confirmation. block_n Threshold number block groups warning/confirmation. warnings Logical; FALSE, bypasses map-size warning prompts.

title: Plot Cattle GPS Fixes on an Interactive Leaflet Map — grz_map
text: leaflet htmlwidget.

what: Tune idle/graze thresholds with clearer diagnostics — grz_tune_thresholds
title: Tune idle/graze thresholds with clearer diagnostics — grz_tune_thresholds
text: Builds practical threshold-tuning outputs rest vs graze separation: data-driven starting cutoff two-component mixture log1p(step_m), threshold sweep score surface, visual diagnostics.

title: Tune idle/graze thresholds with clearer diagnostics — grz_tune_thresholds
code: grz_tune_thresholds(   data,   groups = NULL,   cohort_col = NULL,   tz_local = "UTC",   step_col = "step_m",   speed_col = "speed_mps",   turn_col = "turn_rad",   rest_step_grid = seq(3, 12, by = 1),   rest_speed_grid = seq(0.03, 0.09, by = 0.02),   graze_speed_max = 0.6,   travel_speed_min = 0.6,   travel_turn_max = 0.6,   min_run_n = 2L,   short_bout_mins = 10,   night_hours = c(20:23, 0:5),   max_rows = 25000L,   max_points_plot = 150000L,   seed = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   return_class = c("data.frame", "data.table") )

title: Tune idle/graze thresholds with clearer diagnostics — grz_tune_thresholds
text: data Input data containing GPS rows. groups Group columns used transitions bout calculations. cohort_col Optional cohort column faceting. tz_local Time zone used derive hour--day. step_col Step-distance column (m). speed_col Speed column (m/s). turn_col Turn-angle column (radians). rest_step_grid Candidate rest_step_max values sweep. rest_speed_grid Candidate rest_speed_max values sweep. graze_speed_max Passed classification rule sweep. travel_speed_min Passed classification rule sweep. travel_turn_max Passed classification rule sweep. min_run_n Run smoothing threshold used sweep. short_bout_mins Bout duration threshold instability metric. night_hours Night hours used night-rest metric. max_rows Maximum rows used threshold sweep (sampled needed). max_points_plot Maximum points used density/CDF plots. seed Random seed reproducible subsampling. verbose Logical; print sweep summary. return_class Output class returned tables.

title: Tune idle/graze thresholds with clearer diagnostics — grz_tune_thresholds
text: list suggested, sweep, best, mixture, plots.
